basic_details.job_title: PGIMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Research Fellow and Project Associate I Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education & Research (PGIMER), Chandigarh
basic_details.post_name: Senior Research Fellow (SRF) and Project Associate I

age_limit.details: Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Maximum 35 years. Age relaxation as per Government of India/DBT rules. Project Associate-I: Maximum 35 years. Age relaxation as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in relevant disciplines with NET/GATE and 2 years experience, OR PhD for SRF. Master's Degree in relevant disciplines for Project Associate I.
qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow (SRF): First Class Postgraduate Degree (M.Sc.) in Microbiology/Biotechnology/Life Sciences/Biomedical Sciences/Biochemistry or related disciplines with NET/GATE qualification and at least two years of post-M.Sc. research experience, as per DBT/DST guidelines. First Class Postgraduate Degree (including Integrated PG Degree) with a PhD in relevant disciplines. First Class Four-Year Graduate Degree in Engineering/Technology (Biotechnology or related discipline), wherever applicable under DBT norms. Project Associate-I: Master's Degree in Microbiology, Biotechnology, Life Sciences, Biomedical Sciences, Biochemistry or any allied biological science from a recognised University.

salary_details.pay_scale: SRF: Rs. 42,000 + 18% HRA. Project Associate-I: Rs. 25,000 + 18% HRA.
salary_details.details: Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Rs. 42,000/- per month + 18% HRA Project Associate-I: Rs. 25,000/- per month + 18% HRA

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PGIMER Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PGIMER recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the PGIMER recruitment is 28 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in the PGIMER recruitment?
faq.answer: PGIMER is recruiting for two posts: Senior Research Fellow (SRF) and Project Associate-I. Both positions are temporary and related to research.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Senior Research Fellow (SRF)?
faq.answer: For SRF, candidates need a First Class M.Sc. in relevant disciplines with NET/GATE and 2 years of experience, or a PhD, or a First Class Four-Year Graduate Degree in Engineering/Technology.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for Project Associate-I?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for Project Associate-I must possess a Master's Degree in Microbiology, Biotechnology, Life Sciences, Biomedical Sciences, Biochemistry, or any allied biological science from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for both Senior Research Fellow (SRF) and Project Associate-I positions is 35 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the PGIMER recruitment involves an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience for the interview round.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for Senior Research Fellow (SRF)?
faq.answer: The selected Senior Research Fellow (SRF) will receive a salary of Rs. 42,000/- per month along with 18% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for Project Associate-I?
faq.answer: The Project Associate-I will be offered a salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month, plus 18% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q9. How should I apply for the PGIMER recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email. Prepare your CV and relevant documents and send them to the specified email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.
